name: property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month, manual tracking causes inaccuracies in financial reporting. We automate the generation of monthly utility expense reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual tracking of utility expenses.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual tracking of utility expenses.
